_description: ECC hook templates for React Native / Expo projects. Copy the relevant hooks object into your project's .claude/settings.json

PostToolUse._comment: Run TypeScript type-check after every file edit
Run Expo doctor after editing app.json or package.json

hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT" | grep -q 'app.json\|package.json\|eas.json'; then npx expo-doctor 2>&1 | head -20; fi

PreToolUse._comment: Block hardcoded secrets from being written

hooks.command: echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -E '(API_KEY|SECRET|PASSWORD|TOKEN)\s*=\s*["\x27][^$\{]' && echo 'ERROR: Potential secret detected' && exit 1 || exit 0
echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -E 'AsyncStorage\.setItem.*[Tt]oken|AsyncStorage\.setItem.*[Pp]assword' && echo 'ERROR: Use expo-secure-store for tokens, not AsyncStorage' && exit 1 || exit 0

Stop._comment: Remind to run verification loop at session end

hooks.command:
echo '
=== Mobile Verification Reminder ===
Run before committing:
  1. npx tsc --noEmit
  2. npm test -- --coverage
  3. npx expo-doctor
  4. maestro test .maestro/ (if applicable)
===================================='

installation_instructions.step_2: Copy either 'recommended_hooks' or 'minimal_hooks' into the file as the value
